description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake covered in light blue fondant, featuring a prominent 3D figure of a cartoon dog character wearing a hat, positioned on top near the edge. The cake's surface is decorated with an edible image depicting several colorful cartoon characters, likely from a popular children's show, and is further adorned with small, paw-shaped fondant decorations. The cake sits on a crinkled metallic foil base, which is placed on a wooden board, giving it a festive and celebratory appearance. The fondant covering is smooth and glossy, with the decorations adding playful texture and visual interest. The cake appears to be designed for a children's party or themed celebration, with a strong emphasis on character-based decoration. No candles are visible on the cake.
description: A round, light blue fondant cake with a 3D cartoon dog figure and colorful edible character image, decorated with fondant paw prints and set on a foil-lined wooden board.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cartoon dog figure facing forward, the edible image with multiple characters, and several fondant paw prints clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the dog figure in profile and the colorful edible image, with the foil base and wooden board more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear angled view shows the back of the dog figure and the edge of the edible image, with less detail of the main decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the dog figure from behind, with the fondant surface and paw prints visible, and the foil base wrapping around the cake.
